query: SELECT qi.id, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.category')) AS category, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.qty')) AS qty, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.unitPrice')) AS unitPrice, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.totalPrice')) AS totalPrice FROM quote_items qi WHERE CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.qty')) AS UNSIGNED) > 1 ORDER BY qi.id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute SELECT qi.id, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.category')) AS category, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.qty')) AS qty, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.unitPrice')) AS unitPrice, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.totalPrice')) AS totalPrice FROM quote_items qi WHERE CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(qi.itemData, '$.qty')) AS UNSIGNED) > 1 ORDER BY qi.id DESC LIMIT 20;
